title: phyllanthus goianensis
intro: Phyllanthus goianensis, also known as Goianense, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Brazil, which has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus goianensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Phyllanthus goianensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and has been used in folk medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
